Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Nanjing Enaiti Electronic Technology Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing NIT Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. is an extremely typical demotion specimen of a 'two-person micro engineering proxy and universal sundries shop in Zhujiang Road electronics market' being highly absurdly elevated by the system to a 'major electronic device manufacturing plant.' The forensic engine has completely wiped out the underlying false multinational consumer electronics OEM data pollution tied to Apple Inc. The official commercial system directly threw it into the 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing - Electronic Device Manufacturing' category at the top of the industrial pyramid simply because its name contains 'Electronic Technology' and the beginning of its license has an extremely perfunctory 'R&D of electronic products.' However, the physical probe and common-sense engine immediately executed a comprehensive peeling: this is a micro-enterprise established in 2010, with a paid-in capital of 3.01 million, but its 2024 insured headcount is a pitiful '2 people'! The most fatal coup de grâce comes from its registered coordinates: 'Room 316, Third Floor, No. 185 Zhujiang Road, Xuanwu District, Nanjing City.' No. 185 Zhujiang Road is Nanjing's extremely famous 'Buynow' or a similar-level veteran computer mall. Inside a tiny stall or office (Room 316) on the third floor of a crowded electronics market, relying on the boss and 1 buddy to establish a heavy-asset industrial assembly line manufacturing electronic devices? This not only violates physical common sense, but even the market security guards would kick you out. Reviewing its true business license, which resembles a hodgepodge: the first half is subcontractor business like 'intelligent system engineering, municipal engineering, power engineering, urban lighting engineering'; the second half directly turns into a universal hardware and sundries shop listing 'sales of computer consumables, building materials, thermal insulation materials, wires and cables, labor protection supplies.' The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not an electronic manufacturing plant; this is a Two-Person Engineering Proxy & General Hardware Retailer hidden on the 3rd floor of the Zhujiang Road computer mall. The boss (Ji Mingfeng) most likely has a small office in the computer mall, with the primary business being contracting out various municipal, lighting, or weak-current surveillance engineering jobs externally, while concurrently acting as a middleman, selling cables, insulation materials, and work gloves to construction sites.
